name: projectatlas
description: Agent-first Rust repository atlas, TOON output, and MCP workflows for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: TOON-first repo atlas and MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Use ProjectAtlas to install or invoke the native Rust runtime, generate a project-local MCP config, and guide agents through overview -> folders -> files -> summary/outline/symbols -> exact slices before broad source reads. ProjectAtlas stores purpose metadata and symbol intelligence in SQLite, returns compact TOON payloads, reports token savings, and surfaces cleanup/refactor health findings.
defaultPrompt: Use ProjectAtlas to map this repo.
Use the ProjectAtlas MCP tools before opening files.
